heading: IMPLEMENTATION OF AN ENHANCED DEFENSE PARTNERSHIP BETWEEN THE UNITED STATES AND TAIWAN
label: I IMPLEMENTATION OF AN ENHANCED DEFENSE PARTNERSHIP BETWEEN THE UNITED STATES AND TAIWAN

children.heading: Modernizing Taiwan’s security capabilities to deter and, if necessary, defeat aggression by the People’s Republic of China
International military education and training cooperation with Taiwan
Use of Special Defense Acquisition Fund
Multi-year plan to fulfill defensive requirements of military forces of Taiwan
Fast-tracking sales to Taiwan under foreign military sales program
Establishment of training, advising, and institutional capacity-building program for military forces of Taiwan
